decisions.rationale: Observation maps to its own base_record_id corridor_nostrand-avenue, which is the canonical registry record for Nostrand Avenue. No different target exists.

evidence_refs.source_quote: The map illustrates the SBS corridor from Williamsburg Bridge Plaza Station in Queens to Avenue U Station in Brooklyn.

proposed_relations.description: Nostrand Avenue carries southbound SBS service; Rogers Avenue carries northbound SBS service. Together they form the paired B44 SBS corridor from Williamsburg Bridge to Sheepshead Bay.

evidence_refs.source_quote: Northbound on Rogers Av, Southbound on Nostrand Av

decisions.rationale: Observation maps to its own base_record_id corridor_rogers-avenue, which is the canonical registry record for Rogers Avenue. No different target exists.

evidence_refs.source_quote: Northbound SBS will travel on Rogers instead of New York Ave, for faster and more direct service

decisions.rationale: Observation maps to its own base_record_id corridor_bedford-avenue-201011, which is the canonical registry record for Bedford Avenue in the Nostrand/Rogers SBS project area. No different target exists.

evidence_refs.source_quote: Select Bus Service (SBS) is coming to Nostrand, Rogers, and Bedford Avenues

proposed_relations.description: Bedford Avenue is part of the same SBS project area as Nostrand and Rogers Avenues, as mentioned together in the Nostrand/Rogers SBS handout.

evidence_refs.source_quote: Select Bus Service (SBS) is coming to Nostrand, Rogers, and Bedford Avenues
